generated_oml:
instance PrimaryMotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor of the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotAxisDataStream
]

instance SecondaryGearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox of the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotAxisDataStream
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for motor current (I_M) in the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotAxisDataStream
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel in the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance Sinumerik840DController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for data streaming"
]

instance CoulombViscousModelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model component in digital twin"
]

instance StribeckModelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model component in digital twin"
]

instance DahlModelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model component in digital twin"
]

instance LuGreModelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model component in digital twin"
]

instance RobotAxisDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time series data stream from MABI MAX 100 robot first axis physical system via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PrimaryMotorEncoder, SecondaryGearboxEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinInternalDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Internal data transmission within digital twin for simulated data"
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Physical motor current (I_M) data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotAxisDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance VelocityDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [

    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotAxisDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance TorqueDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [

    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotAxisDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Physical angular velocity data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotAxisDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationTool

    DTDFVocab:fromData DigitalTwinInternalDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationTool
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DigitalTwinInternalDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationTool

instance BDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram model for MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance IBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram model for MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink-based Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink-based Stribeck friction model for joint friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink-based Dahl friction model for joint friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink-based LuGre friction model for joint friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool

instance AASModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell model for data linking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance JointFrictionDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into joint friction dynamics from dashboard visualization"
]

instance ModelParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update of model parameters for control algorithms to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataLinkingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into data linking status using Asset Administration Shells"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into data streaming status from physical system"
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionDynamicsInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization in dashboard for understanding physical relationships"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionDynamicsInsight
]

instance ModelRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous refinement of white- and black-box friction models during operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParameterUpdateAction
]

instance DataLinkingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data linking service using Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLinkingInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data streaming service using MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation of friction and dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ModelRefinementService
]

instance MQTTDataStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming from physical system"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for data linking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLinkingService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for insight generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MABIMAX100RobotFirstAxisDigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Single digital shadow instance for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, Sinumerik840DController, PrimaryMotorEncoder, SecondaryGearboxEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor, CoulombViscousModelComponent, StribeckModelComponent, DahlModelComponent, LuGreModelComponent
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing via MQTT, with no specific sampling rates or time intervals documented"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for data linking, MQTT-streamed sensor data, and unified dashboard visualization for real-time friction analysis and model refinement"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, utilizing live operational data for continuous friction model identification and motion accuracy improvement during robot operation"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured reference data for friction model accuracy, though specific verification metrics or error bounds are not detailed"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from physical robot to digital shadow"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards, SysML for systems engineering modeling, and UML for reference model representation"
]
